title: Certificate course on Mergers & Acquisitions practice by Bettering Results: Taught by leading M&A lawyers!
description: The demand for M&A lawyers in India is growing rapidly due to an increase in foreign investments, a thriving start-up ecosystem, and corporate restructuring initiatives. To succeed as an M&A lawyer, you need practical skills including deal structuring, due diligence, drafting key agreements, and handling negotiations.Lawyers who build these M&A skills early are the ones getting placed in top law firms, investment teams, and corporate houses.Bettering Results (BR) has b
